---
id: handle-create-invitation
title: "Invite a member"
description: "Sends an email invitation to join the organization. Requires owner or admin role. Respects tier member limits. Sends an invitation email with a unique token"
sidebar_label: "Invite a member"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Invite a member"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/orgs/{id}/invitations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sends an email invitation to join the organization. Requires owner or admin role. Respects tier member limits. Sends an invitation email with a unique token

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
